dag_node: Gate 4 — nominal PET training (follows now-PROMOTED Gate 3)
one_line: Gate 3 is PROMOTED PASS (120/120 sources, manifest independently verified by agy). The next node is Gate 4 nominal PET training, which is prohibited without its own launch-code gate AND your explicit authorization. Decide whether/when to start it.
what_is_done_this_turn: User decision evt-user-decision-20260721-0001 (option A) read once and applied: agentctl HOME fix (commit 28bc7c3) confirmed present in HEAD.
Usage snapshot taken (gate PASS; codex-personal 36%, codex-school 19%, claude-personal 81%); no reset credit consumed.

Re-routed the same bounded verification to agy-publication-redteam (UUID 440f42ef..., turn 31, rc=0): VERDICT PASS, evidence-backed (agy independently ran sacct, reloaded 120 receipts, recomputed on-disk hashes, checked sizes/locks/DONE). Concurs with the orchestrator audit.
Gate 3 PROMOTED PASS. Promotion receipt: docs/orchestration/state/p3f-pet-gate3-promotion-56169838.json; canonical status updated in nd-unfolding/PET_UQ_REMEDIATION_STATUS.md.
exact_decision_required: Do you authorize starting the Gate-4 nominal PET training launch-code-gate round, and with what scope/timing? Gate 4 = train and extract one unbootstrapped publication nominal from the Gate-2 target using the frozen estimator fingerprint (plus one matched repeat to bound GPU nondeterminism).
why_blocked: Per every prior turn and the committed gates, nominal PET training stays prohibited until (a) its own hash-bound launch-code gate is built and PASS (as was done for the Gate-3 source array via MIG-P3F-PET-G3-CODEGATE), and (b) you explicitly authorize starting it. The interim standing authorization does not cover starting nominal training.
shutdown_constraint: The 2026-07-22 Perlmutter shutdown (through ~2026-08-03) means a long GPU training job cannot finish before it. Standing rule forbids starting jobs that cannot complete pre-shutdown. Realistically Gate 4 defers to post-restore; the pre-shutdown-checklist watch (2026-07-21) and codex-personal reset/handback watch (2026-07-26) are armed.

options.A_prepare_gate4_codegate_now: Authorize building + validating (NOT launching) the Gate-4 nominal PET launch-code gate now (launcher, estimator-fingerprint binding, closure/repeat validators, receipt/resume tests), so it is ready to submit immediately after restore. No GPU job starts; safe pre-shutdown. Name any worker routing preference.
options.B_defer_to_post_restore: Defer all Gate-4 work until after the 2026-08-03 restore; I hold with armed watches and pick it up then. Nothing further this window.
options.C_authorize_launch_with_timing: Authorize the training launch itself and specify timing/resources (only sensible if it can finish pre-shutdown or you accept restart-on-restore); state account/GPU scope.

how_to_answer: Per WAKER.md 'Answering a BLOCKED-ON-USER stop': delete this file, then  /usr/bin/python3.11 wakerctl.py emit --id user-decision-$(date -u +%Y%m%d-%H%M) --type user-decision --context 'USER DECISION: <A/B/C + scope>. Proceed and re-arm.'  A plain go-ahead can just delete the file (idle guard re-wakes within ~15 min).
invariants: Gate 3 promoted on independent verification only. No nominal PET training started. No reset credit consumed. All worker UUIDs preserved.
